'''Luthus Tadrin''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of the [[Tadrin sector/Legends|Tadrin sector]], one of three [[Sector/Legends|sectors]] that made up the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]]. He was a descendant of [[Cassander Tadrin]], the namesake of the Cassandran Worlds.<ref name="Geonosis" />
